display.purpose: Page titles and section headings only. Semi-Bold 600, clamped 1.5rem–2.5rem.

title.purpose: Card titles, dialog headings, list item titles. Semi-Bold 600 at 1rem.

body.purpose: Long-form text, table cells, descriptions. Regular 400 at 0.875rem. 65–75ch line length.

label.purpose: Button text, form labels, tab labels. Medium 500 at 0.8125rem.

caption.purpose: Metadata, timestamps, helper text. Regular 400 at 0.75rem, 0.02em tracking.

motion.name: transition-fast
motion.purpose: Hover and focus state transitions for interactive elements.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: High-contrast call to action. Near-black fill on white. Used for primary actions in dialogs, toolbars, and empty states.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.375rem; height: 2rem; padding: 0 0.625rem; border-radius: 0.625rem; border: 1px solid transparent; background: oklch(0.205 0 0); color: oklch(0.985 0 0); font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 500; white-space: nowrap; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(0.145 0 0 / 0.8); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: oklch(0.708 0 0); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.708 0 0 / 0.5); } .ds-btn-primary:active:not([aria-haspopup]) { transform: translateY(1px); }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary action button. White fill with boundary stroke. Pairs alongside a primary button in dialogs and toolbars.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.375rem; height: 2rem; padding: 0 0.625rem; border-radius: 0.625rem; border: 1px solid oklch(0.922 0 0); background: oklch(1 0 0); color: oklch(0.145 0 0); font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 500; white-space: nowrap; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms ease, border-color 150ms ease; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: oklch(0.97 0 0); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: oklch(0.708 0 0); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.708 0 0 / 0.5); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Low-emphasis action. Transparent background, visible on hover. Used in table rows, toolbars, and icon-only actions.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-ghost"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M3 6h18"/><path d="M19 6v14c0 1-1 2-2 2H7c-1 0-2-1-2-2V6"/><path d="M8 6V4c0-1 1-2 2-2h4c1 0 2 1 2 2v2"/></svg> Supprimer</button>
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.375rem; height: 2rem; padding: 0 0.625rem; border-radius: 0.625rem; border: none; background: transparent; color: oklch(0.145 0 0); font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 500; white-space: nowrap; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms ease; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: oklch(0.97 0 0); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.708 0 0 / 0.5); }

components.name: Destructive Button
components.description: Destructive action. Muted red fill with red text. Reserved for delete and irreversible operations.
components.css: .ds-btn-destructive { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.375rem; height: 2rem; padding: 0 0.625rem; border-radius: 0.625rem; border: none; background: oklch(0.577 0.245 27.325 / 0.1); color: oklch(0.577 0.245 27.325); font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 500; white-space: nowrap; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms ease; } .ds-btn-destructive:hover { background: oklch(0.577 0.245 27.325 / 0.2); } .ds-btn-destructive:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: oklch(0.577 0.245 27.325 / 0.4); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.577 0.245 27.325 / 0.2); }

components.name: Card
components.description: Room-like container for grouped information. Used sparingly — cards are not the default layout. Distinguished by ring border, not shadow.
components.html:
QR Code Analytics
Scans des 30 derniers jours

Aucune donnée pour cette période.
components.css: .ds-card { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 1rem; border-radius: 0.75rem; background: oklch(1 0 0); color: oklch(0.145 0 0); font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px oklch(0.145 0 0 / 0.1); padding: 1rem; } .ds-card-header { display: grid; grid-template-rows: auto auto; gap: 0.25rem; } .ds-card-title { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.4; } .ds-card-desc { font-size: 0.875rem; color: oklch(0.556 0 0); } .ds-card-content { font-size: 0.875rem; } .ds-card-footer { display: flex; align-items: center; border-top: 1px solid oklch(0.922 0 0); margin-top: -0.5rem; padding-top: 1rem; background: oklch(0.97 0 0 / 0.5); margin-left: -1rem; margin-right: -1rem; padding-left: 1rem; padding-right: 1rem; padding-bottom: 1rem; border-radius: 0 0 0.75rem 0.75rem; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Compact border-defined input field. One focus stroke shift, no glow. Matches button height for aligned form rows.
components.css: .ds-input { display: flex; height: 2rem; width: 100%; padding: 0 0.75rem; border-radius: 0.625rem; border: 1px solid oklch(0.922 0 0); background: transparent; color: oklch(0.145 0 0); font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; transition: border-color 150ms ease; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: oklch(0.556 0 0); } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: oklch(0.708 0 0); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.708 0 0 / 0.5); } .ds-input[aria-invalid="true"] { border-color: oklch(0.577 0.245 27.325); } .ds-input[aria-invalid="true"]:focus { border-color: oklch(0.577 0.245 27.325); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.577 0.245 27.325 / 0.2); }

components.name: Nav Link (Sidebar)
components.description: Vertical sidebar navigation item. Active state uses a tinted background — no left stripe, no underline, no icon colour shift.
components.html: Dashboard QR Codes Équipe
components.css: .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.75rem; padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem; border-radius: 0.5rem; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(0.556 0 0); text-decoration: none; transition: background 150ms ease, color 150ms ease; } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: oklch(0.97 0 0); color: oklch(0.145 0 0); } .ds-nav-active { background: oklch(0.205 0 0 / 0.1); color: oklch(0.205 0 0); }

components.name: Badge / Chip
components.description: Small metadata indicator. Muted fill, Surface Ink text. No colour variants — status is communicated through text or layout, not badge colour.
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 0.125rem 0.5rem; border-radius: 0.375rem; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; background: oklch(0.97 0 0); color: oklch(0.556 0 0); white-space: nowrap; } .ds-chip-outline { background: transparent; border: 1px solid oklch(0.922 0 0); color: oklch(0.145 0 0); }

components.name: Alert Dialog
components.description: Focused confirmation dialog for destructive or critical actions. Centred header with optional media icon, action/cancel button pair in a tinted footer.
components.html:
Supprimer le QR code ?
Cette action est irréversible. Les statistiques seront conservées pendant 30 jours.
components.css: .ds-alert-dialog { position: fixed; top: 50%; left: 50%; transform: translate(-50%, -50%); z-index: 50; width: 100%; max-width: 320px; border-radius: 0.75rem; background: oklch(1 0 0); color: oklch(0.145 0 0); font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px oklch(0.145 0 0 / 0.1); padding: 1rem; } .ds-alert-dialog-header { display: grid; place-items: center; gap: 0.375rem; text-align: center; } @media (min-width: 640px) { .ds-alert-dialog { max-width: 384px; } .ds-alert-dialog-header { place-items: start; text-align: left; } } .ds-alert-dialog-icon { display: inline-flex; width: 2.5rem; height: 2.5rem; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border-radius: 0.375rem; background: oklch(0.97 0 0); margin-bottom: 0.375rem; color: oklch(0.577 0.245 27.325); } @media (min-width: 640px) { .ds-alert-dialog-icon { grid-row: span 2; } } .ds-alert-dialog-title { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.4; } .ds-alert-dialog-desc { font-size: 0.875rem; color: oklch(0.556 0 0); text-wrap: balance; } @media (min-width: 640px) { .ds-alert-dialog-desc { text-wrap: pretty; } } .ds-alert-dialog-footer { display: flex; flex-direction: column-reverse; gap: 0.5rem; margin-left: -1rem; margin-right: -1rem; margin-bottom: -1rem; padding: 1rem; border-top: 1px solid oklch(0.922 0 0); background: oklch(0.97 0 0 / 0.5); border-radius: 0 0 0.75rem 0.75rem; } @media (min-width: 640px) { .ds-alert-dialog-footer { flex-direction: row; justify-content: flex-end; } }

components.name: Dropdown Menu
components.description: Contextual action menu triggered by buttons or avatars. Popover with ring border and shadow. Supports items, checkboxes, radio items, submenus, and destructive variants.
components.html:
Actions
Modifier
Exporter
Supprimer
components.css: .ds-dropdown-content { z-index: 50; min-width: 8rem; padding: 0.25rem; border-radius: 0.625rem; background: oklch(1 0 0); color: oklch(0.145 0 0); font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px oklch(0.145 0 0 / 0.1), 0 4px 6px -1px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1); } .ds-dropdown-label { padding: 0.25rem 0.375rem; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(0.556 0 0); } .ds-dropdown-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.375rem; padding: 0.25rem 0.375rem; border-radius: 0.375rem; cursor: default; } .ds-dropdown-item:hover { background: oklch(0.97 0 0); color: oklch(0.205 0 0); } .ds-dropdown-item-destructive { color: oklch(0.577 0.245 27.325); } .ds-dropdown-item-destructive:hover { background: oklch(0.577 0.245 27.325 / 0.1); } .ds-dropdown-separator { height: 1px; background: oklch(0.922 0 0); margin: 0.25rem -0.25rem; } .ds-dropdown-item svg { width: 16px; height: 16px; flex-shrink: 0; }

components.name: Select
components.description: Native-behaving dropdown for choosing from a list of options. Compact trigger matches input height. Popover with ring border and shadow.
components.html: URL
components.css: .ds-select-trigger { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 0.375rem; height: 2rem; padding: 0.5rem 0.5rem 0.5rem 0.625rem; border-radius: 0.625rem; border: 1px solid oklch(0.922 0 0); background: transparent; color: oklch(0.145 0 0); font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; cursor: default; transition: border-color 150ms ease; } .ds-select-trigger:hover { border-color: oklch(0.556 0 0); } .ds-select-trigger:focus { outline: none; border-color: oklch(0.708 0 0); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.708 0 0 / 0.5); } .ds-select-value { flex: 1; text-align: left; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; }

components.name: Tabs
components.description: Horizontal tab navigation for switching content panels. Default variant uses a muted background container with raised active tab. Line variant uses an underline indicator.
components.html: Contenu de l'onglet sélectionné
components.css: .ds-tabs { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.5rem; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-tabs-list { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; height: 2rem; padding: 3px; border-radius: 0.625rem; background: oklch(0.97 0 0); } .ds-tab { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: calc(100% - 1px); padding: 0.125rem 0.375rem; border-radius: 0.375rem; border: 1px solid transparent; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(0.145 0 0 / 0.6); white-space: nowrap; background: transparent; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms ease, color 150ms ease, box-shadow 150ms ease; } .ds-tab:hover { color: oklch(0.145 0 0); } .ds-tab-active { background: oklch(1 0 0); color: oklch(0.145 0 0); box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 0.05); } .ds-tab:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: oklch(0.708 0 0); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.708 0 0 / 0.5); } .ds-tab-content { font-size: 0.875rem; color: oklch(0.556 0 0); }

components.name: Table
components.description: Standard data table with row hover highlighting. Compact padding for dense data layouts. Horizontal scroll on overflow.
components.html:
NomScansStatutCréé le
Promo été 20261,234Actif12 juin 2026
Catalogue printemps856Actif1 mai 2026
Événement mars—En pause15 mars 2026
components.css: .ds-table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; font-size: 0.875rem; color: oklch(0.145 0 0); } .ds-th { height: 2.5rem; padding: 0 0.5rem; text-align: left; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(0.556 0 0); border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(0.922 0 0); } .ds-tr { border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(0.922 0 0); transition: background 150ms ease; } .ds-tr:hover { background: oklch(0.97 0 0 / 0.5); } .ds-td { padding: 0.5rem; vertical-align: middle; }

components.name: Avatar (with Fallback)
components.description: Circular user avatar with image support, fallback initials, and a subtle border ring that adapts to dark mode.
components.css: .ds-avatar { position: relative; display: flex; width: 2rem; height: 2rem; border-radius: 9999px; } .ds-avatar::after { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; border-radius: 9999px; border: 1px solid oklch(0.922 0 0); mix-blend-mode: darken; } .ds-avatar-fallback { display: flex; width: 100%; height: 100%; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border-radius: 9999px; background: oklch(0.97 0 0); color: oklch(0.556 0 0); font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; }

components.name: Loading Skeleton
components.description: Placeholder shimmer for content that hasn't loaded yet. Uses CSS pulse animation. Sized via class to match expected content dimensions.
components.css: @keyframes ds-pulse { 0%, 100% { opacity: 1; } 50% { opacity: 0.5; } } .ds-skeleton { border-radius: 0.375rem; background: oklch(0.97 0 0); animation: ds-pulse 2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.6, 1) infinite; }

components.name: Empty State
components.description: Instructional blank-slate component for empty lists. Icon, title, description, and optional CTA button. Teaches the interface, not just "nothing here."
components.html:
Aucun QR code

Créez votre premier QR code dynamique pour commencer à suivre vos performances.
components.css: .ds-empty-state { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 1rem; padding-top: 4rem; padding-bottom: 4rem; text-align: center; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-empty-icon { display: flex; width: 4rem; height: 4rem; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border-radius: 9999px; background: oklch(0.97 0 0); } .ds-empty-icon svg { width: 2rem; height: 2rem; color: oklch(0.556 0 0); } .ds-empty-title { font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(0.145 0 0); margin: 0; } .ds-empty-desc { max-width: 20rem; font-size: 0.875rem; color: oklch(0.556 0 0); margin: 0; }

components.name: Separator
components.description: Thin horizontal or vertical visual divider. No margins — spacing is owned by the parent layout.

components.name: Progress Bar
components.description: Linear progress indicator for loading states, quotas, and usage meters. Track is muted, fill is primary. Animated width transition.
components.css: .ds-progress { position: relative; height: 0.5rem; width: 100%; overflow: hidden; border-radius: 9999px; background: oklch(0.97 0 0); } .ds-progress-fill { height: 100%; width: 0%; border-radius: 9999px; background: oklch(0.205 0 0); transition: width 300ms ease; }

narrative.overview:
A place where tools hang on the wall, each in its place — sharp, organised, ready. No decoration, just readiness. QR Studio is a sober, productive interface for professionals who manage QR codes at scale. It takes after Linear, Raycast, and Vercel: surfaces are flat, content is dense, typography is compact, and colour is reserved almost entirely for functional communication (states, data, interactivity). The interface earns trust through precision — tight alignment, exact spacing, predictable interactions — never through ornament.

This system explicitly rejects: generic blue/white B2B SaaS conventions, decorative gradients, giant hero metrics, glassmorphism, side-stripe borders, and anything that reads as 'consumer QR code maker.' If an element can be removed without losing information, it must be.
keyCharacteristics: Flat surfaces with thin ring borders for depth
Grayscale-dominant with a near-black primary and a single reserved red for destructive actions
Typography-driven hierarchy (Inter throughout, weight and size do the work)
Motion only for state transitions (hover, focus, open/close)

rules.name: The Monochrome Discipline
rules.body: Colour is for signalling, not decorating. If you're adding a hue that isn't Danger (red for errors), you have a functional justification or you're breaking the system. Charts are the only exception — they use five grayscale steps that respect the same flat restraint.

rules.name: The Rarity Rule
rules.body: The Danger red appears on ≤2% of any screen. Its saturation makes it findable precisely because everything else is neutral. If danger feels invisible, the answer is better layout and iconography, not more red.

rules.name: The Single-Family Rule
rules.body: No font pairing. Inter at every size and weight. Pairing on a contrast axis (serif + sans, geometric + humanist) is an accepted design practice — this system deliberately rejects it. Consistency is the signal.

rules.name: The Density Rule
rules.body: Body text is 14px, not 16px. Labels are 13px. Captions are 12px. This is intentional: the interface packs more information per viewport, matching the 'precise tooling' principle. If a screen feels sparse, the answer is better information architecture, not larger type.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: No shadows on surface-level containers. Cards, sidebars, page panels, and dialogs never cast shadows. Overlay elements (dropdowns, select popups, sheets, toasts) are the only exceptions — their temporariness earns the shadow.

dos: Do use the Ink/Paper contrast axis for primary actions. The near-black on white is the system's strongest signal; reserve it for what matters most.
Do use Surface Ink (oklch(0.556 0 0)) for secondary text — it provides ~4.6:1 contrast against Paper.
Do use ring-1 ring-foreground/10 for card and container borders. It's crisp, uniform, and works identically in light and dark mode.
Do keep danger colour to ≤2% of any screen. Its rarity makes it discoverable.
Do prefer dense information layouts. 14px body text, 8px grid, compact buttons. Trust the user to parse information quickly.
Do use text-wrap: balance on headings and text-wrap: pretty on body paragraphs.
Do use skeleton placeholders for loading states — let users scan the structure before data arrives.
Do use the Empty State pattern to teach the interface when a list is empty. Never just "nothing here."
Do use shadow-md / shadow-lg on floating overlays (dropdowns, select popups, sheets) — the Flat-By-Default rule applies to surface-level containers, not temporary overlays.
donts: Don't use the generic blue/white B2B SaaS convention (navy primary, blue accents, rounded everything). QR Studio's palette is grayscale-dominant with a near-black primary.
Don't add gradient text, glassmorphism, or side-stripe borders. These are banned by name in the design system.
Don't use hero-metric templates (big number, small label, gradient accent). Data is presented in compact tables and sparklines.
Don't use tiny uppercase tracked eyebrow text above every section (TYPES / STATUS / ABOUT). One deliberate kicker is voice; an eyebrow on every section is a generative tell.
Don't use numbered section markers (01, 02, 03) unless the content is literally a sequential process.
Don't use identical card grids (icon + heading + text repeated). Vary layout rhythm.
Don't use colour as the only indicator of state. Errors, pauses, and deletions must include text, icons, or patterns.
Don't let text overflow its container. Test heading copy at every breakpoint.
Don't animate layout properties. Use transform and opacity only.
Don't skip @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) — all animations must have a reduced-motion fallback.
